description: 1-min FX [495] (rho=-0.127, observed ratio=1.009): a plain AR(1) process at the same rho predicts only 0.71x, so excess_ratio=1.42 exceeds 1.3 -- FX was labeled the 'NULL position' in the original ladder by raw ratio, but shows real excess structure once the (mild) bid-ask-bounce autocorrelation is accounted for
